name: Carry Bags (W-cut/U-cut)
description: Classic carry bags in W-cut and U-cut styles. Strong, certified, and compostable.
longDescription:
At Packin Club, we design compostable carry bags that combine everyday functionality with real-world eco-impact. Unlike traditional plastic bags that persist for centuries, our carry bags fully decompose within months under composting conditions — leaving no toxic residues.

Whether you need W-cut bags for standard retail carry or U-cut bags for groceries and takeaways, Packin Club offers flexible, certified, and premium-quality compostable solutions.

Our bags are CPCB certified, tested by CIPET, and manufactured following ISO 17088 guidelines, ensuring regulatory compliance and a trustworthy sustainable image for your business. Available in multiple sizes, these bags are lightweight yet durable, making them ideal for a variety of business applications — from small boutiques to supermarkets and food delivery services.
keyFeatures: Certified compostable (CPCB approved, CIPET tested, ISO 17088 compliant)
Available in W-Cut and U-Cut designs for flexible usage
Fully customizable with your brand colors and logo
applications: Retail Stores: Fashion, electronics, and lifestyle brands
Grocery Shops: Eco-friendly grocery bagging solutions
Food Delivery Services: Restaurants and cloud kitchens
Trade Shows & Exhibitions: Sustainable branding for giveaways
Gift Shops & Boutiques: Premium, eco-conscious customer packaging

faqs.question: Can these bags be customized with our logo and colors?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer full customization to match your brand identity. MOQ applies for customized orders.

faqs.question: Are these carry bags water-resistant?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are water-resistant and suitable for protecting goods during short-term moisture exposure.

faqs.question: How should the bags be stored before use?
faqs.answer: Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight to maintain strength and integrity for 6-12 months.

faqs.question: Are both W-cut and U-cut bags available in all sizes?
faqs.answer: Yes, both designs can be customized across different sizes based on your requirements.
